source_gaps.gap: Probable pitchers and sportsbook reference prices were retrieved, but lineup, injury, and bullpen notes were not fully verified in a machine-readable source.
source_gaps.handling: Do not classify as CLEAR_PICK. Price-only positives stay WATCH_FOR_PRICE.

source_gaps.gap: Repo weather adapter remained blocked and no venue-level weather/roof feed was fully integrated into this packet.
source_gaps.handling: Do not classify weather-sensitive positions as CLEAR_PICK.

source_gaps.gap: Repo Kalshi adapter kept 0 same-day records, but direct Kalshi series API verification found exact game-winner markets.
source_gaps.handling: Use direct Kalshi API proof in the packet; note adapter improvement needed.

source_gaps.gap: No execution source was called by design.
Edge researcher returned no supported edge; several games blocked by lineup/weather/roof/market-matching gaps and all positive screens were under the 2% pregame gate.
source_gaps.handling: No CLEAR_PICK, no LEAN, no trade.

proof_sources.use: Official game date, teams, status, venue timezone, probable pitchers.
Kalshi event and market ticker, title, bid/ask, status, result, volume/liquidity, open/close time.
DraftKings moneyline and total displayed through ESPN; used only for no-vig reference fair value, not as Kalshi price.
Workspace-generated source health, dry-run guide, picks, run log, and slate manifest.

qa_instruction: QA must act as packet goalie: verify this packet against CLEAR_PICK gates and reject any candidate that lacks full proof.

edge_research.bottom_line: No supported edge returned. Detroit ML was the only screen above 1pp, but remained below the 2% pregame edge gate and had bullpen concern.
